examples: Her love was a fire playing ineffectually over a rock of basalt.
It would compete ineffectually within the market if one undertaking relies on its own resources alone.
Someone, after all, will have to make those painful decisions New Yorkers go on ineffectually talking about.
But they are unlikely to experience once more Eldorado's long-suffering Pilar Moreno ineffectually berating caddish boyfriend Marcus Tandy with cries of "Marrrr-coos".
